zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Allen於大約1646年出生在英國時，他的父親Walter Allen46歲，母親Rebecca Ward43歲。他於大約1694年與Mary Holmes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克吉特利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1728年4月2日在美國緬因州約克貝維其可享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Allen于大约1646年出生在英国时，他的父亲Walter Allen46岁，母亲Rebecca Ward43岁。他于大约1694年与Mary Holmes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克吉特利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1728年4月2日在美国缅因州約克貝維其可享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Allen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Allenby
meanings: English: habitational name from Allonby (Cumberland). The placename is a post-Conquest compound of the French (Breton) personal name Alein (see Allen ) + Old Norse bȳ ‘village’, or the same word borrowed into Middle English.

variants.name: Allin
meanings: English (Devon): variant of   Allen  .
Swedish: variant of   Ahlin  .

variants.name: Alano
meanings: Italian (mainly Campania) and Hispanic (mainly Philippines): from the personal name Alano (see Allen ).

variants.name: Alan
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Allen  . This is the usual form of the personal name in England and Scotland.

variants.name: Allan
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Allen  . This is the more common form of the name in Scotland and northern England. See also   McAllen  .

History: An early bearer of this surname in North America was William Allan, a British soldier who took his family to the newly founded city of Halifax, NS, Canada, in 1749. His son John (1746–1805) was a Revolutionary soldier who eventually (1783) founded the settlement of Allan's Island, Passamaquoddy Bay, ME.

variants.name: Allain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jean-Paul, Adelard, Alban, Albenie, Alphonse, Andree, Cyrille, Donat, Emile, Euclide, Francois.

Breton and French: from the Old Breton personal name Alan (Old French Alain); see Allen . In France the personal name is spelled Alain, and this is also a less common variant of the surname (see Alain ).
English: variant of   Allen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Alen
meanings: English: variant of   Allen  .
Galician (Alén): habitational name from one of the many places called Alén in Galicia (Spain), from Galician alén ‘beyond’.
Flemish and Dutch: patronymic from   Ale  .

variants.name: Allis
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Alis, Alice (Old French Adeliz, Ahelis, Aalis, Aliz). Alice, together with its pet form Alison, was one of the most popular names in both England and Scotland from the 13th century until the end of the medieval period. The personal name is of ancient Germanic origin, brought to England from France by the Normans; it is a shortened form of ancient Germanic Adalheidis, which is composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + haid ‘‘rank, worth’’.

variants.name: Alleyne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Chantal, Julien, Marcell.

English: variant of   Allen  . This is an old-fashioned spelling, already established as a surname in England in Tudor times. Today this surname is found mainly in the West Indies, especially Barbados.

variants.name: Alling
meanings: English: either a variant of Allen , or a variant of Halling with loss of initial H-.
German: habitational name from either of two places called Alling, one in Bavaria and one in Austria.
Danish: habitational name from any of several places called Alling. The placename may be a derivative of al ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1713: Massachusetts, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Allen was born about 1646, in United Kingdom, his father, Walter Allen, was 46 and his mother, Rebecca Ward, was 43. He married Mary Holmes about 1694, in Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 2 April 1728, in Berwick, York, Maine, United States, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Allen est né environ 1646, à Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Allen, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Ward, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Mary Holmes environ 1694, à Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 avril 1728, à Berwick, York, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Allen um 1646 in United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Allen 46 und seine Mutter Rebecca Ward 43. Er hat um 1694 in Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mary Holmes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. April 1728 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Berwick, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Allen è nato il circa 1646 nel Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter Allen, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Rebecca Ward, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Mary Holmes circa 1694, nel Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 2 aprile 1728, nel Berwick, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Allenが約1646年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Walter Allenは46歳，母Rebecca Wardは43歳であった。約1694年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークキッテリーでMary Holmesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1728年4月2日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークバーウィックで83歳で死去した。

ko.Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 찰레스타운
ko.New England: 오스트레일리아 뉴 소우스 월스 뉴 잉글랜드
ko.Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 키터이
ko.So. Berwick, York, Me: 미국 메인 주 요르크 소우스 버윅
ko.Berwick, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 버윅
ko.lifeSummary: Walter Allen(이)가 대략 1646년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Allen(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Rebecca Ward(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1694년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 키터이에서 Mary Holmes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1728년 4월 2일 미국 메인 주 요르크 버윅에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Allen nasceu aproximadamente 1646, em United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Allen, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Ward, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Holmes aproximadamente 1694, em Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de abril de 1728, em Berwick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 83 anos.

ru.Berwick, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: бирвикк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Allen родился около 1646 г. в местности Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Allen было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Ward, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Holmes около 1694 г. в местности киттири, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 2 апреля 1728 г. в местности бирвикк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Allen nació aproximadamente 1646, en Reino Unido, su papá, Walter Allen, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Rebecca Ward, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Mary Holmes aproximadamente 1694, en Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 2 de abril de 1728, en Berwick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 83 años.
